context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the KPI card definitions (with correct metrics, query patterns, and benchmarks), builds a dynamic drill-down query function, applies the recommended visualization types for each statement, and shows percentage metrics alongside absolute values with a data freshness indicator.

checklist.name: Four KPI cards defined
checklist.description: Code or config defines exactly four headline KPIs: Net Revenue, Gross Margin %, EBITDA, and Cash Balance (all four present)

checklist.name: Gross Margin % benchmark
checklist.description: The Gross Margin % KPI includes a benchmark or threshold value of 40.0 (percent) that triggers an alert or highlight when the metric falls below it

checklist.name: Gross Margin % uses NULLIF
checklist.description: The Gross Margin % calculation uses NULLIF (or equivalent guard) on the net_revenue denominator to prevent division-by-zero errors

checklist.name: Net Revenue and EBITDA use prior_period comparison
checklist.description: Net Revenue and EBITDA KPI definitions specify a prior period comparison (not just current value)

checklist.name: Cash Balance from balance_sheet
checklist.description: The Cash Balance KPI query filters on statement_type = 'balance_sheet' (not 'pnl' or 'cash_flow')

checklist.name: Dynamic drill-down function
checklist.description: A function or method is implemented that dynamically builds a P&L query based on optional filter parameters (channel, product_category, geography), adding WHERE clauses only when filters are provided

checklist.name: P&L waterfall chart type
checklist.description: The P&L (income statement) overview is assigned a waterfall chart type, not a bar or line chart

checklist.name: Revenue trend line chart
checklist.description: The revenue trend visualization is specified as a line chart (with prior year or bands), not a bar chart

checklist.name: Expense breakdown donut or treemap
checklist.description: The operating expense breakdown uses a donut chart or treemap, not a pie chart or bar chart

checklist.name: YTD vs budget uses bullet or gauge
checklist.description: The YTD vs. budget comparison uses a bullet chart or gauge visualization (not a simple bar or number card)

checklist.name: Percentage alongside absolute values
checklist.description: Gross margin (and at least one other metric) is displayed with both the absolute dollar amount and the percentage, not just one of them

checklist.name: Data freshness indicator
checklist.description: The dashboard output or component includes a last-updated timestamp field or data freshness indicator displayed alongside the metrics

checklist.name: Drill-down dimensions covered
checklist.description: The drill-down implementation supports at least three of the five dimensions: channel, product_category, geography, customer_segment, time_period

checklist.name: Cash flow bridge waterfall
checklist.description: The cash flow visualization is specified as a waterfall chart (cash flow bridge), not a line or bar chart
